creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
Sergey,
Thanks!  QA in the next PR submission would be super helpful but this was quick enough to check myself.

For the record:

portlint -ac:
looks fine.

poudriere build tests on:

9.3-RELEASE-p30      i386
10.1-RELEASE-p24     amd64
10.1-RELEASE-p24     i386
10.2-RELEASE-p7      amd64
10.2-RELEASE-p7      i386
11.0-CURRENT r291120 amd64
11.0-CURRENT r291120 i386
